_comment: Test-only DSE accounts for issue #24 Playwright suite. Passwords are test-only, never used outside this fixture/seed. Two location_ids are represented to prove tenant isolation (EVAL-CC-04); two DSEs share location-1 to prove owner isolation (EVAL-CC-05). One capability-lacking account proves RBAC deny-by-default (EVAL-CC-08). ADDITIVE NOTE (issue #25, tech-design.md Clarification): dseA/dseB/dseC additionally carry the `convert-lead` capability so this same fixture backs the #25 ('Convert a Lead into an Enquiry') Playwright suite without duplicating user data; noCapabilityUser deliberately still carries no capabilities so it continues to prove RBAC deny-by-default for both create-lead (#24) and convert-lead (#25).

users.note: Primary DSE used for AC1-AC7 happy-path and validation tests; location 1
Same location as dseA, different owner — proves owner-scoped isolation (EVAL-CC-05)
Different location entirely — proves tenant/location isolation (EVAL-CC-04)
Authenticated but lacks the create-lead capability — proves deny-by-default RBAC (EVAL-CC-08, 403 not 401)
